mapper.select: select count(*) from product where status = 1

select
from product where status=1 and name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or description like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')
select count(*) from product where status = 1 and category = #{category}

select *, match (name, description) against( #{keyword} in natural language mode) as relevance from product where status=1 and match (name , description) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) order by relevance desc

select
from product where status=1 and (name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or description like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')) order by create_time desc limit #{offset},#{size}
select count(*) from product where status = 1 and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select from product order by create_time desc limit #{offset},#{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
UPDATE product SET sales = sales + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
